gemini.status: PARSE_FAILED — no picks, treated as no-show

consensus.conviction: SPLIT (Gemini no-show); Claude HIGH on captain — Rival independently agrees on Anderson

verdict: Gemini's report failed to parse, so this is a no-consensus situation on paper. But Claude (the-gaffer) and the-rival INDEPENDENTLY converge on Captain Anderson, giving the captain call effective HIGH conviction. Claude's plan projects 70.45 xPts vs YOU's current 57.5 — a ~13 pt gap driven almost entirely by the armband: your real team captains Bowen (xPts 4.83, near-worst attacker in your XI) while Anderson is the single highest-projected player in the pool (9.03, 18.06 captained). Your current team does NOT match the best plan and needs a move before the final-GW deadline.
highest_leverage_action: MOVE THE CAPTAIN: switch armband from Bowen (4.83) to Anderson (9.03). This single change adds ~8.4 captained xPts at zero cost and zero hit — by far the biggest swing available. Secondary: bench Haaland (confirmed out of City's GW38 squad) for a fit replacement; he is currently a dead starter.
